hero.title: Visualize your JSON data in real time
hero.subtitle: Connect any JSON endpoint and watch your data stream in. Auto-detection, advanced filters, adapts to your schema.

features.title: Features
features.realtimeDesc: Automatic polling with configurable interval. Your data updates continuously.
features.detectionDesc: Automatic recognition of field types: status, method, URL, timestamp, duration...
features.filtersDesc: Filter by status codes, HTTP methods, or free text. Combine filters as you wish.
features.presetsDesc: Save your favorite configurations and switch between them in one click.
features.compareDesc: Select two entries and visualize differences side by side.
features.exportDesc: Export your data and settings, or import them on another browser.

usage.title: How to use
usage.step1: Enter the URL of any JSON API endpoint.
usage.step2: Flowers polls the endpoint and streams data in real time.
usage.step3: Filter, sort, and adjust the layout to suit your needs.

format.title: JSON format
format.description: Flowers works with any JSON response. It auto-detects field types based on common naming conventions. Your API can return an array of objects or a single object.
format.timestampValues: timestamp, time, date, created, createdAt, created_at, updated, updatedAt, updated_at
format.statusValues: status, statusCode, status_code, code, httpStatus, http_status
format.urlValues: url, path, endpoint, route, uri, request, href
format.categoryValues: type, category, kind, level, severity, tag, label
format.sourceValues: source, origin, platform, agent, client, user_agent, userAgent, from, ip
format.durationValues: duration, elapsed, latency, responseTime, response_time, ms, took
format.messageValues: message, msg, text, description, body, content, error, reason, title, name

storage.title: Local storage
storage.description: Flowers stores all your data locally in your browser. Nothing is sent to any server.
storage.endpointsDesc: Your saved API endpoints with their name, URL, and optional remembered state.
storage.presetsDesc: Custom filter and layout presets you create to quickly switch views.
storage.filtersDesc: Your active status codes, HTTP methods, and search query.
storage.settingsDesc: Polling interval, auto-scroll, notifications, and sound alerts preferences.
storage.layoutDesc: Display density, sidebar width, and detail panel width.
storage.pinsDesc: Entries you pinned per endpoint, so they stay visible at the top.
storage.note: You can export and import all of this data via the transfer feature.

monitor.noEndpointHint: Pick one from the sidebar or add a new one

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

editPreset.title: Edit preset
editPreset.description: Modify the name or update the saved state for this preset.

editEndpoint.title: Edit endpoint
editEndpoint.description: Modify the name, URL or saved state for this endpoint.
editEndpoint.rememberStateDescription: Automatically syncs filters, layout and settings in real time

transfer.title: Transfer settings
transfer.description: Your data never leaves your browser.
transfer.errorUnsupportedVersion: This key was exported from a newer version of Flowers.
transfer.errorCorruptedData: Invalid key — check and try again.

legal.title: Legal notice
legal.ipContent: All content on this site (text, images, source code, design) is the exclusive property of its publisher, unless otherwise stated. Any reproduction, representation, or distribution, in whole or in part, of the content of this site without prior authorization is prohibited.
legal.liabilityContent: The publisher strives to provide information as accurate as possible. However, they cannot be held responsible for omissions, inaccuracies, or deficiencies in updating this information. The publisher disclaims all liability in the event of technical difficulties encountered when connecting to the site.
legal.contactContent: For any questions regarding the legal notice, you can contact me at: contact@sylvain.sh

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.dataCollectedContent: This site does not collect any personal data. There are no contact forms, registration systems, or login mechanisms on this site.
privacy.cookiesContent: This site does not use any cookies. The only storage mechanism used is the browser's localStorage, solely to save your preferences: theme (light, dark, or system), layout, polling interval, saved endpoints, and presets. Nothing else is stored.
privacy.thirdPartyFonts: This site uses the Google Fonts Outfit typeface served locally by the Next.js framework. No requests are sent to Google servers during your visit.
privacy.analyticsContent: This site does not use any analytics, tracking, or advertising services. No browsing data is collected or transmitted to third parties.
privacy.rightsContent: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to access, rectify, delete, and port your data. Since no personal data is collected by this site, these rights do not apply in this context.
privacy.contactContent: For any questions regarding the privacy policy, you can contact me at: contact@sylvain.sh
